meaning: adj.周期的,定期的n.期刊,杂志
examples: She made periodical visits to her dentist.
He has gone through periodical changes
The quarterly magazine is a periodical published every three months.
What other whiskey suffers periodical shortages because cases are snatched up before they're even made?
The Kindle, introduced in 2007, has the U.S. periodical market pretty much to itself.
